note: Pre-registered per-bundle expectations. kin_of names the DEFECT CLASS LINEAGE only (the documented Coach-escape classes the WS2/adf gold negatives encode): these bundles are authored trailhub analogues — FEAT-EVAL-QAV (WS2 B12) owns the real four rows and this suite never reproduces them (disjointness tripwire in tests/test_coach_verifier_integrity.py). ground_truth_source is row metadata (a judge cannot know which layer would have caught it) — 'seeded' because every bundle here is authored.

rows.kin_of: gold-negative class 1 — BDD hole: an acceptance criterion evidenced only by a scenario whose step has no definition
gold-negative class 2 — composition seam: public signature change green in isolation, production call sites unexercised
gold-negative class 3 — composition seam: guard merged tested but its producer never wired (hardcoded None), permanently vacuous
gold-negative class 4 — composition seam, recursive: wiring call uses nonexistent kwargs, TypeError swallowed by soft-fail, permissive pin fakes codify the wrong contract
